job_description:
# 100% Remote - Healthcare Data Analyst
Company: Prodware Solutions
Source: LinkedIn via Jobs via Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/100%25-remote-healthcare-data-analyst-at-jobs-via-dice-4372553583

- Remote healthcare data analyst role.
- Focus on data profiling, onboarding, mapping, and validation.
- Mentions HL7, FHIR, and CCDA requirements.
strengths: Healthcare data analysis and validation overlap
Some mapping and source onboarding relevance

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Data Profiling | Source-to-Target Validation
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, profiling, and reconciling enterprise data across healthcare and regulated domains. Strong hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, source-to-target testing, business-rule mapping, and data quality analysis supporting accurate downstream reporting and onboarding of complex data assets.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms—covering claims, member eligibility, provider, and payer-operations data and supporting complex source-to-target mapping needs.
replacements.find: Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms—covering claims, member eligibility, provider, and payer-operations data supporting multi-million-member BCBS populations.

replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules to support structured data onboarding, profiling, and issue detection across enterprise healthcare datasets.
replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.

gaps: HL7/FHIR/CCDA interoperability is not established on the resume
Clinical standards focus is a stretch
notes: Borderline fit. Tailoring only emphasizes data profiling, mapping, and validation, not interoperability expertise.
